title: checkout-svc 5xx spike after discount feature deploy
summary: checkout-svc returned 500s minutes after a deploy that added percentage-discount support. A TypeError was thrown reading a property of an undefined coupon object on the checkout path.
root_cause: applyDiscount read coupon.total without guarding against a missing coupon, so requests without a coupon threw 'Cannot read properties of undefined'.
resolution: Rolled back the deploy to restore service, then shipped a fix guarding the coupon (default to 0% discount when absent) with a regression test.
runbook: Confirm the error signature in logs/Sentry (TypeError ... applyDiscount).
Identify the suspect deploy via rollout history / recent commits.
Roll back the deployment to the last good revision to stop the bleeding.
Patch the null-guard, add a regression test, redeploy.

title: inventory-svc latency from an unindexed query
summary: inventory-svc p95 latency climbed past SLO after a catalog growth spurt; a stock-lookup query was doing a full table scan.
root_cause: A missing composite index on (warehouse_id, sku) made the hot stock-lookup query O(n) as the table grew.
resolution: Added the composite index online; p95 returned to baseline within minutes.
runbook: Pull p95 latency trend and confirm the regressing endpoint.
Capture a slow query sample / EXPLAIN plan.
Add the missing index online, verify the plan uses it.

title: payment-svc pods OOMKilled under load
summary: payment-svc pods were OOMKilled and entered CrashLoopBackOff during a traffic peak after a release that buffered full responses in memory.
root_cause: A new code path accumulated response bodies in an unbounded in-memory list, leaking memory until the container hit its limit.
resolution: Rolled back, then streamed responses instead of buffering; raised the memory request/limit as a stopgap.
runbook: Check pod events for OOMKilled and restart counts.
Correlate onset with the most recent rollout.
Roll back if a recent deploy is implicated; profile memory before re-releasing.

title: auth-svc 401 storm after certificate rotation
summary: A wave of 401s hit all services after an auth-svc certificate rotation; tokens signed with the new key failed validation downstream.
root_cause: The new signing key's public half wasn't distributed to verifiers before the cutover, so valid tokens failed signature checks.
resolution: Published the new JWKS to all verifiers and staggered future rotations with an overlap window.
runbook: Check for a recent cert/key rotation change.
Verify the JWKS endpoint serves the current signing key.
Roll the key back or push the new public key, then re-test auth.

title: checkout-svc cart total computed as NaN
summary: Some checkouts showed a NaN total after a pricing refactor when an item lacked a numeric price.
root_cause: calcSubtotal multiplied price*qty without coercing/validating price, so a missing price produced NaN that propagated to the total.
resolution: Added input validation and a default price of 0 with an alert on missing prices.
runbook: Reproduce with a cart containing an item missing a price.
Add validation/coercion at the subtotal step.
Backfill missing prices and alert on them.

title: gateway 5xx from a bad config rollout
summary: The API gateway returned 5xx after a config push set an upstream timeout to 0, failing every request fast.
root_cause: A templating error rendered the upstream timeout as 0ms, so all proxied requests timed out immediately.
resolution: Reverted the config, added a validation check rejecting non-positive timeouts in CI.
runbook: Diff the most recent config rollout.
Revert to the last known-good config.
Add a CI guard for invalid config values.
